subject: Warp not running
body:
Hi, Dimitry


I am a new user of warp. My issue is that, it shows the following massage 
soon after I start it. Afterwards, it stops using the graphics card 
memories. I am using windows 10, cuda 10.2, gtx1070 and 64 gb memory. Could 
you give me hint what might cause this issue? Thanks.


Joe
